query:
ALTER TABLE leads 
ADD COLUMN monthlyVisits INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN globalRank INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN bounceRate DECIMAL(5,2) NULL,
ADD COLUMN trafficDataFetchedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
